zh.lifeSummary: 當Alix de Brabant於1274年5月20日出生在比利時布拉班特洛文時，她的父親Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot20歲，母親Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon19歲。她於1302年與Jean d'Harcourt III結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1315年6月17日在法國崔英德梅其艾雷--布倫享年41歲，埋葬在法國崔英德梅其艾雷--布倫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alix de Brabant于1274年5月20日出生在比利时布拉班特洛文时，她的父亲Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot20岁，母亲Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon19岁。她于1302年与Jean d'Harcourt III结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1315年6月17日在法国崔英德梅其艾雷--布倫享年41岁，埋葬在法国崔英德梅其艾雷--布倫。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brabant
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Aristide, Marcel, Normand, Ovila, Yvan.
French, Walloon, Flemish, and German: habitational name from Brabant, a province in the Low Countries.

English: cognate of 1 above, from Old French Brabant, Middle English Braban, Brabayn, used to denote both the region and an inhabitant of it. See also the synonymous Brabazon . In medieval England, Brabans were typically linen weavers and cloth merchants. The final syllable of Braban, when weakly stressed, was often altered to -ben, -bin, or -bon, and also to -bam. The additional -t or -d in post-medieval Brabant, Braband , etc. is probably excrescent, rather than a relic of the Old French form.

variants.name: Brabender
meanings: German (mainly Westphalia): habitational name for someone from Brabant (see   Brabant  ), perhaps applied also as a nickname for a merchant of Brabantine cloth.

variants.name: Brabazon
meanings: English: from Old French Brabançon, Anglo-Norman French Brabanzon, Middle English Brab(a)son ‘Brabanter’. This was originally an ethnic name for a native of the duchy of Brabant (now in north Belgium). Medieval Brabant was widely known for two exports, its brutal mercenary soldiers and its linen cloth. In the 13th century parts of France were devastated by marauding gangs of armed Brabanters, and brabançon came to be used generically to denote a mercenary, hired assassin, or robber. These originated in Brabant and Flanders, but in the course of time accepted recruits from anywhere. The true source of the surname is the presence in many English (and Irish) towns of Brabant cloth merchants.

variants.name: Bremner
meanings: Scottish: habitational name for someone from Brabant in the Low Countries, from Older Scots Brebner, Brabanare ‘native or inhabitant of Brabant’ (see Brabant and compare with the synonymous Brabazon ). Weavers from Brabant settled early at Aberdeen and on the east coast of Scotland.
German: habitational name for someone from the city of Bremen. This surname is very rare in Germany.

variants.name: Brabham
meanings: English: variant of Brabant , altered by association with English habitational names ending in -ham.

variants.name: Braband
meanings: German and English: variant of   Brabant  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Alix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Alex  , used only as a feminine name. Its formation has probably been influenced by   Alice .

en.lifeSummary: When Alix de Brabant was born on 20 May 1274, in Leuven, Brabant, Belgium, her father, Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot, was 20 and her mother, Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon, was 19. She married Jean d'Harcourt III in 1302. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 17 June 1315, in Mézières-en-Brenne, Indre, Centre, France, at the age of 41, and was buried in Mézières-en-Brenne, Indre, Centre, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alix de Brabant est née le 20 mai 1274, à Louvain, Brabant, Belgique, son père, Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Jean d'Harcourt III en 1302. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 juin 1315, à Mézières-en-Brenne, Indre, Centre, France, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Mézières-en-Brenne, Indre, Centre, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alix de Brabant am 20. Mai 1274 in Leuven, Brabant, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot 20 und ihre Mutter Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon 19. Sie hat 1302 Jean d'Harcourt III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. Juni 1315 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Mézières-en-Brenne, Indre, Centre, Frankreich und wurde in Mézières-en-Brenne, Indre, Centre, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de Brabant è nata il il 20 maggio 1274 nel Leuven, Brabante, Belgio, sua padre, Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Jean d'Harcourt III nel 1302. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 17 giugno 1315, nel Mézières-en-Brenne, Indre, Centre, Francia, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Mézières-en-Brenne, Indre, Centre, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Alix de Brabantが1274年5月20日にベルギーブラバントレウベンで生まれた時，父Godfried van Brabant-Aarschotは20歳，母Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzonは19歳であった。1302年にJean d'Harcourt IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1315年6月17日にフランスセントアインダームeズイeレス-エン-ブレンで41歳で死去し，フランスセントアインダームeズイeレス-エン-ブレンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alix de Brabant(이)가 1274년 5월 20일 벨기에 브라반트 레우븐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1302년 Jean d'Harcourt III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1315년 6월 17일 프랑스 세트르 인드르 e지e레스--브렌에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세트르 인드르 e지e레스--브렌에 묻혔다.

pt.20 mai 1274–17 June 1315: 20 de maio de 1274–17 de junho de 1315
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de Brabant nasceu em 20 de maio de 1274, em Leuven, Brabante, Bélgica, seu pai, Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean d'Harcourt III em 1302. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de junho de 1315, em Mézières-en-Brenne, Indre, Centre, França, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Mézières-en-Brenne, Indre, Centre, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alix de Brabant родилась 20 мая 1274 г. в местности леувен, брабант, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean d'Harcourt III в 1302 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 17 июня 1315 г. в местности мeзиeрес-ен-бренн, индр, кентр, Франция в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности мeзиeрес-ен-бренн, индр, кентр, Франция.

es.20 mai 1274–17 June 1315: 20 de mayo de 1274–17 de junio de 1315
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alix de Brabant nació el 20 de mayo de 1274, en Leuven, Brabante, Bélgica, su papá, Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Jean d'Harcourt III en 1302. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 17 de junio de 1315, en Mézières-en-Brenne, Indre, Centre, Francia, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Mézières-en-Brenne, Indre, Centre, Francia.
